description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:5.10 Docker image and a global before_script that runs npm config set spin false, installs bower, ember-cli, and phantomjs-prebuilt globally via npm, then runs npm install and bower install --allow-root. Define a single job named test that inherits the before_script and executes ember test. No additional stages, caches, artifacts, services, or deployment targets are specified. The pipeline runs on any branch by default.
